rounds: Two weeks of going through the motions — routine held, which is something, but the Apollo ring moment is the one we're clocking. A colleague opened a door and you closed it fast. The ring stayed on your finger, which means part of you wanted it visible. But the conversation? That one went to the Joy Police.
pattern: They're letting you wear the things but shutting down anyone who notices.
focus: One conversation where you let someone see the ring properly — you don't have to explain everything, just don't close the door
